name: Goldy's Dungeon Bars
recipeInstructions:
Set oven to 350°F. Grease a 9- by 13- inch pan.
Cream butter and sugars together. Beat in eggs and vanilla. Add flour, salt, and baking soda. Stir in oats and raisins. Spread in the prepared pan. Bake in preheated oven for 30 minutes. Cool slightly and cut into 32 bars.
